meaning: Stage81.1 recomputes the Stage75 survival matrix after Stage76~81 reabsorption. It proves branchpoint logic reabsorption at runtime/smoke/actual-text levels, while keeping commercial gaps separate.

commercial_readiness_gaps.reason: Stage81 renders 30 scenes for endurance; it does not yet produce 3 full broadcast episodes as final manuscripts.
Stage76 restores 532-scene planning metadata. Actual rendering at that scale is outside Stage81.1 scope.
Stage82 must compare V1700 against pure GPT and external baselines.
Commercial declaration needs user-facing package, sample episodes, quality reports, and blind benchmark evidence.
